name: Shadows Of Doubt
description:
Hyper-industrialisation has swept the planet.
The Old Bourbon Empire has crumbled, giving way to the United Atlantic States and the first elected megacorporation president in history: STARCH KOLA.
As sea levels rise, cities have become polluted islands.
Workers dream of escaping to THE FIELDS: an exclusive retirement district that few will ever see.
Rival corporations vie for power, policed by the privatised Starch Kola ENFORCERS.
Some say justice now only exists in the shadows...The Shadows Of Doubt.

-

So I have been playing a SHIT TON of Shadows Of Doubt and wanted to be able to do some roleplay while I play the game, in the setting of the game. But I figured I am not the only girl who loves Noir settings, and seeing as there no other Shadows of Doubt bots, I figured it was time to change that.
creator: Igelthehedgehog
